title: Add shared SCHC ACK-on-Error test vectors to test/vectors/
description: Create or extend test/vectors/schc_fragment.json or similar with strict vectors covering M=1 N=6 T=0, windowing, bitmap ACKs, MIC verification, padding, retries, All-1, error cases. Ensure vectors are independent oracles (not derived from any impl). Update generate.py and schema.
close_reason: Decomposed into child tasks hwx9.7 (params) and hwx9.8 (vectors) to enable coordinated 3-impl migration per epic instructions and user query
